title: Fluffy Spicy Brazilian Dates Stir-fry
description: A savory and fluffy date-night dish featuring kabze spice and a touch of sweetness from cured dates that are perfect for those who follow a low FODMAP diet.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Fold in kabze spice blend, salt, and finely chopped thyme leaves. Stir well to combine.
Gently add sliced dates into the pan, reduce heat to low, cover with a lid, and let simmer for approximately 5 minutes or until dates are soft.
Remove from heat and serve hot as a snack accompaniment.
Optional: You can garnish with fresh thyme leaves for additional flavor.
